content_body:
What a view!! We have enjoyed waking up to mountain sunrises and gazing at the night sky from the hot tub. We have had a great time visiting your beautiful cabin. We stayed for 4 days and took a hike each day. We hiked off Stanley Rd., over by the Toccoa River and Lake Blue Ridge. As we leave tomorrow, we plan to stop and pick apples at Mercier Orchard (weekend in Sept.). We had camp fires, played pool, and grilled out. It's been a perfect getaway and hope to come back. Thank you for the memories.
GA
title: Perfect Way to Experience Blue Ridge
